name: Phylogenetic Tree Construction
description: Distance-based tree construction from aligned sequences. UPGMA (Unweighted Pair Group Method with Arithmetic Mean): iteratively merge closest clusters; assumes molecular clock; produces rooted ultrametric tree. Neighbor-Joining (Saitou-Nei 1987): Q-matrix Q(i,j) = (n-2)d(i,j) - Σd(i,k) - Σd(j,k); join pair minimizing Q; no molecular clock; unrooted. Both O(n³). Input: distance matrix from alignment (e.g. p-distance, Jukes-Cantor). Used in metagenomics, taxonomy, evolution.
mermaid:
graph TD
    Align["Sequence alignment\nNW, SW, or MSA"]
    DefDist["Def: Distance matrix D\nd(i,j) from alignment"]
    DefUPGMA["Def: UPGMA\nMerge by average distance"]
    DefNJ["Def: Neighbor-Joining\nQ-matrix, minimize Q(i,j)"]
    ThmUPGMA["Thm: UPGMA produces\nrooted ultrametric tree"]
    ThmNJ["Thm: NJ produces\nunrooted additive tree"]
    LemClock["Lem: UPGMA assumes\nmolecular clock"]
    LemNoClock["Lem: NJ does not\nassume clock"]
    Align --> DefDist
    DefDist --> DefUPGMA
    DefDist --> DefNJ
    DefUPGMA --> ThmUPGMA
    DefNJ --> ThmNJ
    ThmUPGMA --> LemClock
    ThmNJ --> LemNoClock

    class Align axiom
    class DefDist,DefUPGMA,DefNJ definition
